title: glechoma lamiopsis
intro: Glechoma lamiopsis, also known as creeping thyme, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glechoma lamiopsis include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Glechoma lamiopsis can be found in tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
